original_text_ne: कुनै व्यक्तिले अर्को व्यक्तिलाई भाडामा रकम तिर्दा भाडा रकमको दश प्रतिशत कर कट्टी गरी...
original_text_en: When any person pays rent to another person, they shall deduct tax at the rate of ten percent of the rent amount...
plain_language_ne: Bhada tirda 10% TDS katnu parcha. Landlord lai 90% matra dinus, 10% sarkar lai.
plain_language_en: When paying rent, deduct 10% TDS. Pay only 90% to landlord, deposit 10% to government.
practical_example: Monthly rent Rs 20000 → Pay Rs 18000 to landlord, deposit Rs 2000 TDS to IRD
common_questions: Sabai bhada ma TDS katnu parcha?
exceptions: Residential rent below threshold may be exempt

section: Section 89 - TDS on Fees for Professional Services
original_text_ne: व्यावसायिक सेवा शुल्क तिर्दा शुल्क रकमको पन्ध्र प्रतिशत कर कट्टी गरी राजश्व खातामा जम्मा गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: While making payment for professional services, tax shall be deducted at the rate of fifteen percent of the fee amount and deposited to the revenue account.
plain_language_ne: Professional service ko shulk tirda 15% TDS katnu. Service provider lai 85% matra dinu, baki 15% sarkar lai bujhau.
plain_language_en: Deduct 15% TDS on professional fees. Pay 85% to the service provider, remit 15% to government.
practical_example: Legal fee Rs 50,000 → Pay Rs 42,500 to lawyer, deposit Rs 7,500 TDS
exceptions: Payments to non-residents may have different rates

original_text_ne: बैंक तथा वित्तीय संस्थाले बचत खातामा ब्याज दिँदा ब्याज रकमको पाँच प्रतिशत कर कट्टी गरी राजश्व जम्मा गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Banks and financial institutions shall deduct tax at five percent on interest paid on savings accounts and deposit to the revenue.
plain_language_ne: Bank bata paune byaj ma 5% TDS katkincha. Tumlai 95% matra pauchau, 5% sarkar lai jane.
plain_language_en: 5% TDS is deducted on interest earned from bank savings. You get 95%, 5% goes to government.
practical_example: Annual interest Rs 10,000 → Receive Rs 9,500, TDS Rs 500
common_questions: Fixed deposit ma pani TDS lagcha?
TDS cut bhako byaj income tax return ma k show garne?
exceptions: Interest below Rs 2,000 per year may be exempt

original_text_ne: कम्पनीले आफ्ना सेयरधनीलाई लाभांश वितरण गर्दा लाभांश रकमको पाँच प्रतिशत कर कट्टी गरी राजश्व जम्मा गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: A company distributing dividend to its shareholders shall deduct tax at five percent of the dividend amount and deposit to revenue.
plain_language_ne: Company le diye ko dividend ma 5% TDS katnu. Shareholders lai 95% matra paunchan, 5% sarkar jane.
plain_language_en: Deduct 5% TDS on dividend paid to shareholders. Shareholders get 95%, 5% goes to government.
practical_example: Dividend Rs 100,000 → Pay Rs 95,000 to shareholder, TDS Rs 5,000
exceptions: Dividend from exempt entities may be exempt

original_text_ne: व्यवसायबाट प्राप्त आयमा कर लाग्नेछ। करको दर वार्षिक आयको आधारमा निर्धारण गरिनेछ।
original_text_en: Tax is levied on income derived from business. The tax rate shall be determined based on annual income.
plain_language_ne: Business ko nafa ma income tax tirnu parcha. Jati dherai kamauchau, teti dherai tax tirnu parcha.
plain_language_en: You must pay income tax on business profits. The more you earn, the more tax you pay.
practical_example: Annual profit Rs 500,000 → Tax approx Rs 50,000 (for individual, slab rate)
common_questions: Business income ma kati tax lagcha?
exceptions: Small businesses may be eligible for presumptive taxation

original_text_ne: व्यवसाय सञ्चालन गर्न खर्च भएको रकम आयबाट कट्टी गर्न पाइनेछ। तर व्यक्तिगत खर्च कट्टी हुँदैन।
original_text_en: Expenses incurred for business operations may be deducted from income. However, personal expenses shall not be deducted.
plain_language_ne: Business chalau kharcha (rent, salary, raw materials) lai income bata ghatayera tax calculate garna milcha. Tara personal kharcha mildeina.
plain_language_en: You can deduct business expenses (rent, salary, materials) from your income before calculating tax. Personal expenses are not deductible.
practical_example: Income Rs 800,000, expenses Rs 300,000 → Taxable income Rs 500,000
exceptions: Capital expenditure may be depreciated, not fully deducted

original_text_ne: स्थायी सम्पत्तिमा भएको मूल्य ह्रासलाई आयकर गणना गर्दा कट्टी गर्न पाइनेछ। ह्रास दर सम्पत्तिको प्रकार अनुसार फरक हुनेछ।
original_text_en: Depreciation on fixed assets shall be allowed as a deduction in computing income tax. The rate of depreciation varies according to the type of asset.
plain_language_ne: Sampati ko value ghatda tyo ghati lai pani income bata ghatayera tax kam garna milcha. Different assets ko different depreciation rate.
plain_language_en: You can deduct the decrease in value of assets (depreciation) from your income to reduce tax. Different asset types have different rates.
practical_example: Machinery cost Rs 1,000,000, depreciation rate 15% → Deduct Rs 150,000 per year
exceptions: Land does not depreciate

original_text_ne: कुनै वर्षमा घाटा भएमा सो घाटालाई अर्को ७ वर्षसम्म आयसँग साट्न पाइनेछ।
original_text_en: If there is a loss in any year, such loss may be set off against income for up to 7 subsequent years.
plain_language_ne: Yadi kunai saal business ma ghati bhayo bhane tyo ghati lai aune 7 saal samma ko nafa sanga jodera tax kam garna sakinchha.
plain_language_en: If you have a business loss, you can carry it forward and set it off against profits for up to 7 years, reducing tax.
practical_example: Loss of Rs 200,000 in 2023, profit Rs 300,000 in 2024 → Tax on Rs 100,000 only
common_questions: Kati saal samma carry forward garna milcha?
Loss carry forward garda ke form bharnu parcha?
exceptions: Certain losses cannot be carried forward if ownership changes

original_text_ne: व्यक्तिगत आयकर दर वार्षिक आयको आधारमा निम्नानुसार हुनेछ: ५ लाखसम्म १%, ५–१० लाख १०%, १०–२० लाख २०%, २० लाखभन्दा माथि ३०%।
original_text_en: Personal income tax rates shall be as follows based on annual income: up to 500,000 – 1%, 500,001–1,000,000 – 10%, 1,000,001–2,000,000 – 20%, above 2,000,000 – 30%.
plain_language_ne: Tapaiko annual income anusar tax rate: 5 lakhs samma 1%, 5–10 lakhs 10%, 10–20 lakhs 20%, 20 lakhs mathi 30%.
plain_language_en: Income tax rates: up to NPR 500k – 1%, 500k-1M – 10%, 1M-2M – 20%, above 2M – 30%.
exceptions: Senior citizens get an additional 10% discount on tax liability

original_text_ne: निर्धारित क्षेत्रमा लगानी गरेमा आयकरमा छुट वा रियायत प्राप्त हुनेछ।
original_text_en: Investment in specified sectors shall be eligible for tax rebates or concessions.
plain_language_ne: Kunai special sector (jaise agriculture, tourism) ma lagaani garyo bhane tax ma discount paucha.
plain_language_en: If you invest in specified sectors (e.g., agriculture, tourism), you may get tax rebates.
practical_example: Invest Rs 500,000 in approved tourism project → Get 10% rebate on tax liability
common_questions: Kun sector ma lagani garda rebate pauncha?
exceptions: Rebate limited to 50% of tax liability

original_text_ne: प्रत्येक करदाताले प्रत्येक आर्थिक वर्षको मध्य माघसम्म कर विवरण पेश गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Every taxpayer shall file a tax return by mid-Magh (end of January) of each fiscal year.
plain_language_ne: Hare sal magh mas samma income tax return bharnu parcha. Natra fine lagna sakcha.
plain_language_en: File your income tax return by the end of January each year. Late filing incurs penalties.
practical_example: Fiscal year ends Ashadh (July). Return due by Magh (Jan) – about 6 months later.
exceptions: Extension may be granted for valid reasons

original_text_ne: कर विवरण पेश गर्न नसकेमा वा गलत विवरण पेश गरेमा जरिवाना र थप कर लाग्नेछ।
original_text_en: Failure to file return or filing incorrect return shall attract penalties and additional tax.
plain_language_ne: Return time ma nahalyam or galat halyam bhane jariwana tirnu parcha. Ani tax pani tirnu parcha.
plain_language_en: Late or incorrect filing leads to penalties and interest. Be careful.
practical_example: Return filed 3 months late → Penalty 10% of tax + interest 15% per annum
exceptions: No penalty if reasonable cause is shown

original_text_ne: वार्षिक कारोबार रू. २० लाखभन्दा बढी हुने प्रत्येक व्यवसायीले VAT दर्ता गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Every business with annual turnover exceeding NPR 2 million shall register for VAT.
plain_language_ne: Yadi tapaiko business ko sal ko karobar 20 lakhs bhanda badhi cha bhane VAT registration garnu parcha.
plain_language_en: If your annual turnover exceeds NPR 2 million, you must register for VAT.
practical_example: Turnover Rs 2.5 million → Must register; turnover Rs 1.8 million → optional registration
exceptions: Certain goods/services exempt from VAT registration

original_text_ne: VAT दर्ता भएको व्यवसायीले व्यवसाय बन्द गरेमा वा कारोबार सीमा घटेमा VAT दर्ता रद्द गर्न सकिन्छ।
original_text_en: A VAT-registered business may deregister if it closes down or turnover falls below the threshold.
plain_language_ne: Business banda bhayo ya turnover ghatyo bhane VAT registration cancel garna milcha.
plain_language_en: You can cancel VAT registration if you stop business or turnover drops below the limit.
practical_example: Business closed → Apply for deregistration within 15 days
common_questions: Deregistration ko lagi ke form cha?
exceptions: Deregistration may be refused if tax dues are pending

original_text_ne: VAT दर्ता भएका व्यवसायीले प्रत्येक बिक्रीको VAT सहितको इनभ्वाइस जारी गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: A registered business shall issue a tax invoice with VAT for each sale.
plain_language_ne: VAT registered bhaye pachi har bechdai ma VAT sahit ko bill dinu parcha.
plain_language_en: If registered, you must issue invoices showing VAT for every sale.
practical_example: Sale Rs 10,000 + VAT 13% = Rs 11,300 → Invoice shows VAT Rs 1,300
common_questions: Bill ma VAT clearly dekhna parcha?
exceptions: Small cash sales below Rs 500 may not require invoice

original_text_ne: VAT दर्ता व्यवसायीले बिक्री गर्दा VAT असुल गरी मासिक रूपमा राजश्व खातामा जम्मा गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: A VAT-registered business shall collect VAT on sales and deposit it to the revenue account monthly.
plain_language_ne: Bechda VAT collect garne ani mahine ko 25 gate samma tyo VAT sarkar lai bujhau.
plain_language_en: Collect VAT on sales and deposit to government by 25th of each month.
practical_example: Monthly sales Rs 500,000, VAT 13% = Rs 65,000 → Deposit by 25th of next month
common_questions: VAT deposit na gare ke huncha?
exceptions: Small businesses may file quarterly

original_text_ne: व्यवसायको लागि खरिद गर्दा तिरेको VAT (इनपुट VAT) लाई बिक्री गर्दा उठाएको VAT (आउटपुट VAT) बाट कट्टी गर्न पाइनेछ।
original_text_en: Input VAT paid on purchases for business may be deducted from output VAT collected on sales.
plain_language_ne: Kina gareko saman ko VAT (input) lai bechda collect gareko VAT (output) bata ghatayera net VAT matra bujhnu parcha.
plain_language_en: You can deduct the VAT you paid on purchases (input VAT) from the VAT you collected on sales (output VAT), and pay only the net amount.
practical_example: Input VAT Rs 30,000, Output VAT Rs 50,000 → Pay net Rs 20,000
common_questions: Kun kun kura ma input VAT claim garna milcha?
Input VAT claim garna ke chahincha?
exceptions: Input VAT on personal items not claimable

original_text_ne: VAT दर्ता व्यवसायीले प्रत्येक महिनाको २५ गतेभित्र VAT विवरण पेश गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: VAT-registered businesses shall file VAT returns by the 25th of each month.
plain_language_ne: Hare mahina ko 25 gate samma VAT return online bharnu parcha. Natra jariwana.
plain_language_en: File VAT return by 25th of each month. Late filing attracts penalties.
practical_example: Return for July due by Aug 25
exceptions: Quarterly filing for certain businesses

original_text_ne: VAT विवरण नपेश गरेमा वा गलत विवरण पेश गरेमा कर अधिकृतले पुनः मूल्यांकन गरी जरिवाना लगाउन सक्छ।
original_text_en: If return is not filed or is incorrect, the tax officer may reassess and impose penalties.
plain_language_ne: Return nahalya ya galat halya bhane tax officer le check garera penalty lagauna sakcha.
plain_language_en: Failure to file or incorrect filing may lead to reassessment and penalties by tax authorities.
practical_example: Underpaid VAT by Rs 10,000 → Penalty 50% of tax = Rs 5,000
exceptions: Penalty waived if voluntary disclosure

original_text_ne: निर्दिष्ट वस्तु र सेवाहरू (जस्तै, शिक्षा, स्वास्थ्य) VAT बाट मुक्त हुनेछन्।
original_text_en: Specified goods and services (e.g., education, health) are exempt from VAT.
plain_language_ne: Kunai saman ra sewa (school, hospital) ma VAT lagdaina.
plain_language_en: Some goods/services like education and healthcare are VAT-free.
practical_example: School fees – no VAT; Health services – no VAT
common_questions: Exempt ra zero-rated ma k farak?
exceptions: Exemption applies only if provided by registered entities

original_text_ne: निर्यात गरिने वस्तु तथा सेवामा VAT दर शून्य प्रतिशत हुनेछ, तर इनपुट VAT कट्टी गर्न पाइनेछ।
original_text_en: Exported goods and services are zero-rated (0% VAT), but input VAT can be claimed.
plain_language_ne: Export ma VAT 0% lagcha, tara input VAT bhanne claim garna paucha.
plain_language_en: Exports are zero-rated – you don't charge VAT, but you can still claim input VAT credits.
practical_example: Export sales Rs 1,000,000, input VAT Rs 50,000 → Can claim Rs 50,000 refund
common_questions: Zero-rated ra exempt ma k farak?
exceptions: Must have export documentation

original_text_ne: यदि इनपुट VAT आउटपुट VAT भन्दा बढी भएमा सो फरक रकम फिर्ता पाउन सकिन्छ।
original_text_en: If input VAT exceeds output VAT, the excess amount may be refunded.
plain_language_ne: Input VAT output VAT bhanda badhi bhaye tyo farak sarkar le phirta dincha.
plain_language_en: If you paid more VAT on purchases than you collected on sales, you can get a refund of the excess.
practical_example: Input VAT Rs 70,000, Output Rs 50,000 → Claim refund Rs 20,000
exceptions: Refund may be adjusted against other tax dues

original_text_ne: कम्पनी दर्ताको लागि आवेदन दिनु पर्नेछ र नाम स्वीकृत गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: An application must be submitted for company registration and the name must be approved.
plain_language_ne: Company banuna lagi naam swikriti ra registration apply garnu parcha.
plain_language_en: To form a company, you must apply for registration and get name approval.
practical_example: Apply with proposed name and MOA/AOA; get certificate of incorporation
common_questions: Kati din ma company register huncha?
exceptions: Name must not be identical to existing company

section: Section 5 - Memorandum and Articles of Association
original_text_ne: कम्पनी दर्ताका लागि प्रबन्धपत्र र नियमावली पेश गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Memorandum and Articles of Association must be submitted for company registration.
plain_language_ne: Company register garda MOA ra AOA submit garnu parcha.
plain_language_en: Submit MOA (objectives) and AOA (rules) for registration.
practical_example: MOA states business objectives; AOA contains internal management rules
common_questions: MOA ra AOA ma ke lekhnu parcha?
exceptions: One-person company may have simpler AOA

original_text_ne: प्रत्येक कम्पनीमा कम्तीमा एक जना सञ्चालक हुनु पर्नेछ र उसले कम्पनीको हितमा काम गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Every company shall have at least one director, who shall act in the best interests of the company.
plain_language_ne: Company ma kamti ma 1 director hunu parcha, ra usle company ko hit ma matra kaam garnu parcha.
plain_language_en: Each company must have at least one director. The director must act in the company's best interests.
practical_example: Director decides on business strategies and ensures compliance
exceptions: Public companies need at least 3 directors

original_text_ne: सञ्चालकले आफ्नो कर्तव्य पालना नगरेमा वा कम्पनीलाई नोक्सानी पुर्याएमा उसले क्षतिपूर्ति दिनु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: A director who fails to perform duties or causes loss to the company shall be liable for compensation.
plain_language_ne: Director le duty palana nagarya ya company lai ghata diye bhane usle tyo ghata tirnu parcha.
plain_language_en: Directors are personally liable if they breach duties or cause damage to the company.
practical_example: Director makes unauthorized loan causing loss → Must reimburse
common_questions: Director ko personal liability kati samma?
exceptions: Liability may be limited if acting in good faith

original_text_ne: कम्पनीको सेयर पूँजी सेयरमा विभाजन गरिनेछ र सेयरधनीहरूको दायित्व सीमित हुनेछ।
original_text_en: The share capital of the company shall be divided into shares, and shareholders' liability shall be limited.
plain_language_ne: Company ko paisa lai shares ma bhaag garincha, ra share dhani ko limit tinka shares ko amount samma matra.
plain_language_en: Company capital is divided into shares; shareholders' liability is limited to unpaid share amount.
practical_example: Authorized capital Rs 1 crore, divided into 100,000 shares of Rs 100 each
exceptions: Unlimited companies have unlimited liability

original_text_ne: कम्पनीले निर्देशिका (prospectus) जारी गरी सर्वसाधारणलाई सेयर बिक्री गर्न सक्छ।
original_text_en: A company may issue a prospectus and offer shares to the public.
plain_language_ne: Company le public lai share bechna prospectus nikalna sakcha.
plain_language_en: A company can issue shares to the public through a prospectus.
practical_example: IPO issue of 500,000 shares at Rs 100 each
exceptions: Private companies cannot issue shares to public

original_text_ne: प्रत्येक कम्पनीले प्रत्येक आर्थिक वर्षको अन्त्यमा वार्षिक साधारण सभा गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Every company shall hold an Annual General Meeting (AGM) at the end of each fiscal year.
plain_language_ne: Hare company le har sal AGM garnu parcha. Shareholders lai bulaera report sunaunu parcha.
plain_language_en: Hold AGM yearly to present financials and elect directors.
practical_example: AGM within 6 months of year-end; shareholders vote on accounts
exceptions: One-person company may not need AGM

original_text_ne: कम्पनीको ठूलो निर्णय (जस्तै, नाम परिवर्तन, पूँजी वृद्धि) का लागि विशेष प्रस्ताव पारित गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Major decisions (e.g., change of name, increase of capital) require a special resolution.
plain_language_ne: Company ko thulo nirnaya (name change, capital badhaune) lai special resolution chahincha, jasma 75% shareholder ko sahamati.
plain_language_en: Special resolution (75% votes) needed for major changes like name, capital, etc.
practical_example: Increase capital from Rs 1 crore to Rs 2 crore → Special resolution required
exceptions: Certain changes may not need special resolution if AOA allows

original_text_ne: प्रत्येक कम्पनीले आफ्नो लेखा अडिट गराउनु पर्नेछ र अडिटर नियुक्त गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Every company shall have its accounts audited and appoint an auditor.
plain_language_ne: Company ko account haru auditor le check garnu parcha, ra auditor appoint garnu parcha.
plain_language_en: Every company must appoint an auditor and get accounts audited annually.
practical_example: Appoint a chartered accountant as auditor; submit audited financials to ROC
exceptions: Small companies may be exempt from audit

original_text_ne: रोजगारीको सर्तहरू लिखित रूपमा उल्लेख गर्नु पर्नेछ र दुवै पक्षले हस्ताक्षर गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Terms of employment must be in writing and signed by both parties.
plain_language_ne: Job ko condition haru paper ma lekhera dui jana le signature garnu parcha.
plain_language_en: Employment terms must be documented in a written contract signed by both employer and employee.
practical_example: Contract includes job role, salary, working hours, leave, termination
exceptions: Oral contracts for casual work may be allowed

original_text_ne: दैनिक कामको समय ८ घण्टा र साप्ताहिक ४८ घण्टा भन्दा बढी हुनु हुँदैन।
original_text_en: Daily working hours shall not exceed 8 hours and weekly hours shall not exceed 48 hours.
plain_language_ne: Hare din 8 ghanta, hapta ma 48 ghanta bhanda dherai kaam garna mildaina.
plain_language_en: Maximum 8 hours/day and 48 hours/week.
practical_example: Work from 9am to 5pm with 1-hour lunch break = 7 hours? Actually 8 hours net, so 9-6 with 1 hour break.
exceptions: Certain industries (e.g., hospitality) may have different arrangements

original_text_ne: अतिरिक्त समयमा काम गराउँदा सामान्य ज्यालाको दोब्बर भत्ता दिनु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Overtime work shall be compensated at double the normal wage rate.
plain_language_ne: Regular time bhayeko kaam garema tyas ko double pay dinu parcha.
plain_language_en: Overtime pay = 2x normal hourly rate.
practical_example: Normal hourly rate Rs 500; overtime hour = Rs 1,000
exceptions: Some managerial staff may be exempt from overtime

original_text_ne: कर्मचारीले वार्षिक १३ दिन सार्वजनिक बिदा, १२ दिन चाडपर्व बिदा, र १५ दिन बिरामी बिदा पाउनेछन्।
original_text_en: Employees are entitled to 13 days public holiday, 12 days festival leave, and 15 days sick leave per year.
plain_language_ne: Hare saal 13 din public holiday, 12 din festival leave, 15 din sick leave pauncha.
plain_language_en: Annual leave: 13 public, 12 festival, 15 sick days.
practical_example: Employee takes 10 days festival leave; remaining 2 days to be encashed or carried over
exceptions: Probation period may not get full leave

original_text_ne: महिला कर्मचारीले सुत्केरी बिदा ६० दिन पाउनेछिन् र त्यस अवधिमा पूर्ण तलब पाउनेछिन्।
original_text_en: Female employees are entitled to 60 days maternity leave with full pay.
plain_language_ne: Mahila karmachari lai 60 din maternity leave paucha, tyo bela full salary dinu parcha.
plain_language_en: 60 days fully paid maternity leave for female employees.
practical_example: Employee takes maternity leave; receives salary as usual for 60 days
common_questions: Maternity leave pachi ke garnu parcha?
exceptions: Only for employees who have worked for certain period

original_text_ne: पुरुष कर्मचारीले आफ्नो बच्चा जन्मिएको १५ दिनभित्र १५ दिन पितृत्व बिदा पाउनेछन्।
original_text_en: Male employees are entitled to 15 days paternity leave within 15 days of childbirth.
plain_language_ne: Purush karmachari lai baccha janme pachi 15 din paternity leave paucha.
plain_language_en: 15 days paternity leave for male employees, to be taken soon after child's birth.
practical_example: Child born on Jan 1 → Take leave from Jan 2-16
exceptions: Leave may be granted only once per year

original_text_ne: रोजगारी समाप्त गर्नु अघि ३० दिनको नोटिस दिनु पर्नेछ वा सो बराबरको ज्याला दिनु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Employment termination requires 30 days' notice or pay in lieu of notice.
plain_language_ne: Job chodna ya nikalna lai 30 din agadi bhanu parcha, natra 30 din ko paisa tirnu parcha.
plain_language_en: 30 days' notice or 30 days' pay must be given for termination.
practical_example: Employer terminates without notice → Pays 30 days salary in lieu
exceptions: Summary dismissal for gross misconduct may not require notice

original_text_ne: रोजगारी समाप्त भएमा कर्मचारीले काम गरेको अवधिको आधारमा अलग्याउने पारिश्रमिक पाउनेछ।
original_text_en: Upon termination, the employee shall receive severance pay based on length of service.
plain_language_ne: Job chhode pachi kaam gareko barsa anusar severance pay paucha.
plain_language_en: Severance pay = at least 30 days' salary for each year of service, plus remaining leave encashment.
practical_example: 5 years service → 5 x 30 days = 150 days salary as severance
exceptions: May be less if termination for cause

original_text_ne: रोजगारीमा जात, लिङ्ग, धर्म, क्षेत्र, वा अपांगताको आधारमा भेदभाव गर्न पाइँदैन।
original_text_en: Discrimination in employment on grounds of caste, gender, religion, region, or disability is prohibited.
plain_language_ne: Job ma jati, ling, dharma, thau, apangata ko aadhar ma bhedbhav garna paudaina.
plain_language_en: No discrimination in hiring, promotion, or termination based on caste, gender, etc.
practical_example: Cannot reject applicant solely because of gender or caste
exceptions: Affirmative action may be allowed for disadvantaged groups

original_text_ne: कर्मचारीले आफ्नो गुनासो लिखित रूपमा व्यवस्थापनलाई दिनु पर्नेछ र १५ दिनभित्र समाधान गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: Employees shall submit grievances in writing to management, which shall resolve within 15 days.
plain_language_ne: Karmachari le kunai problem bhayeko paper ma management lai dinu, ra management le 15 din bhitra samadhan garnu.
plain_language_en: Write a complaint to management; they must resolve within 15 days.
practical_example: Employee complains about harassment; management investigates and acts within 15 days
exceptions: Urgent matters may be escalated immediately

original_text_ne: कर्मचारीले रोजगारीको अवधिमा र पछि पनि कम्पनीको गोप्य जानकारी खुलाउनु हुँदैन।
original_text_en: The employee shall not disclose confidential information of the company during and after employment.
plain_language_ne: Job ma ra job chhode pachi pani company ko gopya kura kasaile bhandina.
plain_language_en: Keep company secrets confidential, even after leaving.
practical_example: Employee signs NDA; cannot share trade secrets or client lists
exceptions: Information already public is not confidential

original_text_ne: रोजगारी समाप्त भएको १ वर्षसम्म कर्मचारीले प्रतिस्पर्धी कम्पनीमा काम गर्न वा आफ्नै प्रतिस्पर्धी व्यवसाय सुरु गर्न पाउँदैन।
original_text_en: The employee shall not work for a competitor or start a competing business for 1 year after termination.
plain_language_ne: Job chhode pachi 1 saal samma competitor company ma kaam garna paudaina, ani aafno competitor business suru garna paudaina.
plain_language_en: Non-compete for 1 year after leaving; cannot join or start a competing business.
practical_example: Employee leaves IT firm; cannot join another IT firm for 1 year
exceptions: May be void if too broad or unreasonable

original_text_ne: भाडादारले प्रत्येक महिनाको १ गतेभित्र भाडा तिर्नु पर्नेछ। ढिला गरेमा १०% जरिवाना लाग्नेछ।
original_text_en: The lessee shall pay rent by the 1st of each month. Late payment shall incur a 10% penalty.
plain_language_ne: Hare mahina ko 1 gate samma bhada tirnu parcha. Dherai bhaye 10% fine.
plain_language_en: Pay rent by 1st of each month; late fee 10%.
practical_example: Rent Rs 20,000; if paid on 5th → pay Rs 22,000 (10% fine)
exceptions: Grace period may be allowed in contract

original_text_ne: भाडादारले घरधनीलाई २ महिनाको भाडा बराबरको जमानत रकम जम्मा गर्नु पर्नेछ, जुन सम्झौता अन्त्यमा फिर्ता गरिनेछ।
original_text_en: The lessee shall deposit a security deposit equivalent to 2 months' rent, refundable at the end of the lease.
plain_language_ne: 2 mahina ko bhada barabar ko security deposit rakhnu parcha, lease sakkepachi firta pauncha.
plain_language_en: Pay 2 months rent as security deposit; refundable at lease end (less damages).
practical_example: Rent Rs 25,000 → Deposit Rs 50,000; returned after inspection
exceptions: Deposit may be used to cover unpaid rent or damages

original_text_ne: घरधनीले प्रमुख मर्मत (छाना, पाइपलाइन) को खर्च बेहोर्नु पर्नेछ, र भाडादारले साना मर्मत (बत्ती, फिटिङ) को खर्च बेहोर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: The lessor shall bear major repairs (roof, pipes); the lessee shall bear minor repairs (lights, fittings).
plain_language_ne: Thulo mermat (chhana, pipeline) ghar dhani le garne; sano mermat (batti, fitting) bhadadar le garne.
plain_language_en: Major repairs by owner, minor repairs by tenant.
practical_example: Leaking roof → owner pays; broken bulb → tenant pays
common_questions: Kun mermat ko paisa kasle tirne?
exceptions: If damage caused by tenant, tenant pays

original_text_ne: कुनै पक्षले १ महिनाको पूर्व सूचना दिएर सम्झौता समाप्त गर्न सक्छ।
original_text_en: Either party may terminate the lease with 1 month's prior notice.
plain_language_ne: Pahile 1 mahina agadi bhanera lease todna milcha.
plain_language_en: Terminate with 1 month notice.
practical_example: Tenant wants to leave; gives 30 days notice, vacates, gets deposit back
exceptions: If lease has fixed term, early termination may incur penalty

original_text_ne: खरिदकर्ताले बिक्री मूल्यको ५०% पूर्वभुक्तानी र बाँकी ५०% डेलिभरीको १५ दिनभित्र तिर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: The buyer shall pay 50% advance and the remaining 50% within 15 days of delivery.
plain_language_ne: 50% pehle dinu, baki 50% delivery pachi 15 din bhitra tirnu.
plain_language_en: 50% upfront, 50% within 15 days after delivery.
practical_example: Total Rs 100,000 → Pay Rs 50,000 now, Rs 50,000 on delivery+15 days
exceptions: Cash discount for full payment upfront

original_text_ne: विक्रेताले खरिद आदेश प्राप्त भएको ३० दिनभित्र वस्तु डेलिभर गर्नु पर्नेछ। ढिला गरेमा ०.५% दैनिक जरिवाना।
original_text_en: The seller shall deliver goods within 30 days of purchase order. Late delivery incurs a daily penalty of 0.5% of the order value.
plain_language_ne: Order aayeko 30 din bhitra saman puraunai parcha. Dherai bhaye 0.5% din ko fine.
plain_language_en: Deliver within 30 days; delay penalty 0.5% per day.
practical_example: Order Rs 500,000, delivery 10 days late → Penalty 500,000*0.5%*10 = 25,000
exceptions: Force majeure events may excuse delay

original_text_ne: विक्रेताले बिक्री गरेको वस्तु १ वर्षसम्मको वारेन्टी प्रदान गर्नेछ। दोषपूर्ण वस्तुको मर्मत वा प्रतिस्थापन गरिनेछ।
original_text_en: The seller warrants the goods for 1 year. Defective goods will be repaired or replaced.
plain_language_ne: 1 saal ko guarantee; saman bigriya bhane repair ya naya dinu parcha.
plain_language_en: 1-year warranty: repair or replace defective items.
practical_example: Product fails within 6 months → Seller repairs free of charge
exceptions: Warranty excludes damage due to misuse

original_text_ne: खरिदकर्ताले डेलिभरीको ७ दिनभित्र दोषपूर्ण वस्तु फिर्ता गर्न सक्छ र पूरा रकम फिर्ता पाउन सक्छ।
original_text_en: The buyer may return defective goods within 7 days of delivery and receive a full refund.
plain_language_ne: Saman aako 7 din bhitra bigriyeko saman firta garna milcha, paisa firta paucha.
plain_language_en: Full refund for defective goods returned within 7 days.
practical_example: Return faulty laptop within 7 days → get full Rs 100,000 back
exceptions: Customized goods may not be returnable

original_text_ne: आर्थिक वर्ष २०७८/७९ को आयकर विवरण पेश गर्ने म्याद २०७९ माघ १५ गतेसम्म रहेको छ।
original_text_en: The deadline for filing income tax return for FY 2078/79 is extended to Magh 15, 2079 (January 30, 2023).
plain_language_ne: Income tax return bharna ko lagi time badayera Magh 15 samma diyeko cha.
plain_language_en: Tax return filing deadline extended to Jan 30.
practical_example: Return must be filed by Jan 30, otherwise penalty
exceptions: Individual taxpayers may have different deadlines

original_text_ne: समयमा कर विवरण नपेश गर्ने करदातालाई १०,००० रुपैयाँ जरिवाना तथा बाँकी करमा १५% ब्याज लाग्नेछ।
original_text_en: Taxpayers failing to file returns on time shall be subject to a penalty of NPR 10,000 and interest at 15% on tax due.
plain_language_ne: Return time ma nahalne lai 10,000 jariwana ra baaki tax ma 15% byaaj lagcha.
plain_language_en: Late filing: NPR 10,000 penalty + 15% interest on unpaid tax.
practical_example: Tax due Rs 50,000, filed 2 months late → Penalty 10,000 + interest 50,000*15%*2/12 = 1,250
exceptions: Penalty may be waived for first-time offenders

original_text_ne: VAT दर्ता व्यवसायीहरूले अनिवार्य रूपमा इलेक्ट्रोनिक बिलिङ प्रणाली अपनाउनु पर्नेछ र मासिक विवरण पेश गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: VAT-registered businesses must adopt electronic billing system and file monthly returns.
plain_language_ne: VAT registered business le electronic bill system use garnu parcha, ani mahina ko return bharnu parcha.
plain_language_en: Mandatory e-billing and monthly returns for VAT registered entities.
practical_example: Implement billing software; send electronic invoices to customers
exceptions: Small businesses may get extension

original_text_ne: आर्थिक वर्ष २०७९/८० देखि सबै VAT दर्ता व्यवसायीले अनिवार्य रूपमा इलेक्ट्रोनिक बिलिङ गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: From FY 2079/80, all VAT-registered businesses must implement electronic billing.
plain_language_ne: Yo aarthik barsa dekhi sabai le electronic bill garna parcha.
plain_language_en: Mandatory e-billing for all from this fiscal year.
practical_example: Generate QR code invoices; customers can verify VAT
exceptions: Business in remote areas may get exemption

section: Circular No. 5/2079 - Tax Deduction at Source for Rental
original_text_ne: भाडा भुक्तानी गर्दा १०% TDS कट्टा गर्ने र राजश्व जम्मा गर्ने प्रक्रिया स्पष्ट पारिएको छ।
original_text_en: Clarification issued on deducting 10% TDS on rent payments and depositing to revenue.
plain_language_ne: Bhada ko 10% TDS kasari cut garne ra bujhaune, tyo process clear gariyeko cha.
plain_language_en: Guidance on 10% TDS on rent: deduction and deposition process.
practical_example: Deduct TDS, deposit via e-payment within 25 days of month end
exceptions: Residential rent below Rs 50,000 per month exempt

original_text_ne: सबै नियोक्ताले कर्मचारीको सामाजिक सुरक्षा कोषमा ११% र कर्मचारीबाट ११% कट्टी गरी जम्मा गर्नु पर्नेछ।
original_text_en: All employers must contribute 11% to social security fund and deduct 11% from employee salary.
plain_language_ne: Employer le 11% ra employee ko 11% social security fund ma bujhau.
plain_language_en: Employer 11% + employee 11% social security contribution.
practical_example: Salary Rs 50,000 → Employer pays Rs 5,500, employee pays Rs 5,500
exceptions: Certain temporary employees may be excluded

original_text_ne: सबै नियोक्ताले सामाजिक सुरक्षा कोषमा दर्ता गर्ने अन्तिम मिति २०८० असार १५ गते रहेको छ।
original_text_en: Deadline for employers to register with Social Security Fund is Ashad 15, 2080 (June 29, 2023).
plain_language_ne: SSF ma register garna last date Ashad 15 ho.
plain_language_en: Register with SSF by June 29.
practical_example: Submit registration documents to SSF by the deadline
exceptions: New businesses must register within 30 days of establishment

section: Circular No. 8/2080 - Tax Rates for FY 2080/81
original_text_ne: आगामी आर्थिक वर्ष २०८०/८१ को लागि आयकर दरहरू यथावत राखिएको छ।
original_text_en: Income tax rates for the upcoming FY 2080/81 remain unchanged from previous year.
plain_language_ne: Naya barsa ko income tax rates pahile jasto nai cha.
plain_language_en: Tax rates unchanged for next fiscal year.
practical_example: Same slab rates: 1%,10%,20%,30%
exceptions: Rebates for senior citizens remain

section: Circular No. 9/2080 - Tax Rebates for Senior Citizens
original_text_ne: ७५ वर्षभन्दा माथिका करदातालाई आयकरमा १०% थप छुट दिइनेछ।
original_text_en: Taxpayers above 75 years shall receive an additional 10% discount on income tax.
plain_language_ne: 75 barsa mathi ko lai tax ma 10% discount.
plain_language_en: 10% extra rebate for senior citizens aged 75+.
practical_example: Tax liability Rs 100,000 → after rebate Rs 90,000
exceptions: Only for resident individuals

original_text_ne: सबै कर भुक्तानी अनलाइन माध्यमबाट गर्न अनिवार्य गरिएको छ। बैंक काउन्टरबाट भुक्तानी स्वीकार नगर्ने।
original_text_en: All tax payments must be made online. Bank counter payments will no longer be accepted.
plain_language_ne: Sabai tax online tirnu parcha. Bank ma gayera tirna mildaina.
plain_language_en: Mandatory online tax payment; cash/cheque at bank counters not accepted.
practical_example: Use IRD's online portal to pay taxes
exceptions: Rural areas may have offline options
